name: azure-devops-stackit-service-connection
description: Azure DevOps extension for STACKIT service connections with WIF and Key Flow authentication

scripts.clean: rm -rf tasks/*/dist tasks/*/index.js tasks/*/*.js tasks/*/*.js.map tasks/*/*.d.ts tasks/*/*.d.ts.map tasks/*/tests/**/*.js
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run install:task && node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --project tasks/stackit-authenticate
scripts.test: npm run build && npm --prefix tasks/stackit-authenticate test
scripts.validate:extension: rm -rf .tfx-validation && npx tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.json --output-path .tfx-validation --no-prompt && rm -rf .tfx-validation
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run validate:extension && npx tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.json --rev-version
scripts.package:publish: npm run validate:extension && npx tfx extension publish --manifest-globs vss-extension.json --publisher $(node -p "require('./vss-extension.json').publisher") --service-url https://marketplace.visualstudio.com --token $MARKETPLACE_PAT --no-prompt

author: STACKIT
